name: Face Brick Calculator
seo_description: Calculate face bricks, mortar and joint grout for brick facades. Free construction calculator with waste factor.
example_label: Calculatete face bricks for a facade 8m x 2.8m deducting 4m² for openings.

range_hints.descontar_huecos: Total area of windows and doors to deduct

result_context: Facade of {area_bruta} m² gross ({area_neta} m² net) requires {ladrillos_ud} face bricks, {mortar_kg} kg of mortar and {lechada_kg} kg of joint grout.
formula_display: Net area = (Length x Height) - Openings; Bricks = Net area x 55 per m²
steps: Calculatete bricks: 18.4m² x 55/m² x 1.07 (7% waste) = 1,083 bricks
Calculatete joint grout: 18.4m² x 0.5 kg/m² = 9.2 kg
mistakes: Not accounting for higher waste (7%) due to face brick delicacy
Not including special joint grout for exposed brickwork
Not ordering extra bricks for cutting and pattern layout
description: Face Brick Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
desc: Face Brick Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
